title: gh#7: Perf: Sharp triple-decode in processImageUpload
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/7.
Backlog section: Performance.

## Problem

`processImageUpload` runs 4 separate Sharp pipelines on the same image. Each decode costs 80-120ms for a 25MP JPEG. Estimated 40-50% CPU reduction by reusing pipeline clones and `resolveWithObject`.

## Identified by

Code quality review Run 1 — performance-optimizer (perf-002, perf-003)

## Fix

Use `sharp.clone()` and `toBuffer({ resolveWithObject: true })` to get dimensions from the processing pass. Reduces 4 decodes to 2. Also consider `sharp.cache({ memory: 50 })` and `sharp.concurrency(2)`.

## Files

- `packages/api/src/services/media.service.ts:54-93`
- `packages/api/src/__tests__/services/media.test.ts` (tests assert on call shape — need rewrite)
